zh.lifeSummary: 當Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel於1275年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根澤德時，他的父親Hywel Hen ap Cadwgon ap Trahaearn30歲，母親Mrs. Hywel Hen ap Cadwgan26歲。他於1339年與Ellyw Verch Iorwerth在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1375年在英國英格蘭享年100歲。

zh-hans.Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Wales: 威尔士格拉莫爾根澤德
zh-hans.Cantref Mawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾
zh-hans.Castell, Breconshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯布雷康史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel于1275年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根澤德时，他的父亲Hywel Hen ap Cadwgon ap Trahaearn30岁，母亲Mrs. Hywel Hen ap Cadwgan26岁。他于1339年与Ellyw Verch Iorwerth在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1375年在英国英格兰享年100岁。

nameMeanings.name: O’r
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Orre (Old Norse Orri, originally a byname meaning ‘black grouse’).
Scottish (southwestern): nickname from Scottish Gaelic odhar ‘dun, of sallow complexion’. This surname is also common in Ireland. It was brought to Ulster from Scotland in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: When Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel was born in 1275, in Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Hywel Hen ap Cadwgon ap Trahaearn, was 30 and his mother, Mrs. Hywel Hen ap Cadwgan, was 26. He married Ellyw Verch Iorwerth in 1339, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1375, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel est né en 1275, à Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Hywel Hen ap Cadwgon ap Trahaearn, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Hywel Hen ap Cadwgan, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Ellyw Verch Iorwerth en 1339, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1375, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel 1275 in Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel Hen ap Cadwgon ap Trahaearn 30 und seine Mutter Mrs. Hywel Hen ap Cadwgan 26. Er hat 1339 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom Ellyw Verch Iorwerth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1375 im Alter von 100 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel è nato il nel 1275 nel Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Hywel Hen ap Cadwgon ap Trahaearn, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Hywel Hen ap Cadwgan, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Ellyw Verch Iorwerth nel 1339, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1375, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 100 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywelが1275年にウェールズグラモーガンセングヘニーッドで生まれた時，父Hywel Hen ap Cadwgon ap Trahaearnは30歳，母Mrs. Hywel Hen ap Cadwganは26歳であった。1339年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでEllyw Verch Iorwerthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1375年にイギリスイギリスで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel(이)가 1275년 웨일스 글램르건 센게이니드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel Hen ap Cadwgon ap Trahaearn(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Hywel Hen ap Cadwgan(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1339년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Ellyw Verch Iorwerth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel nasceu em 1275, em Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Hywel Hen ap Cadwgon ap Trahaearn, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Hywel Hen ap Cadwgan, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellyw Verch Iorwerth em 1339, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1375, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 100 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel родился в 1275 г. в местности сеньхенидд, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Hywel Hen ap Cadwgon ap Trahaearn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Hywel Hen ap Cadwgan, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellyw Verch Iorwerth в 1339 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1375 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 100 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llewelyn O’r  ap Hywel nació en 1275, en Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Hywel Hen ap Cadwgon ap Trahaearn, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mrs. Hywel Hen ap Cadwgan, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Ellyw Verch Iorwerth en 1339, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1375, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 100 años.
